case_title: RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC VS. LAN VUONG et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VUONG, LAN AKA LAN T VUONG AKA VUONG T LAN AKA HUONG LAN VUONG DOES 1-15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-09-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-25-2006

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC SERVED JUL-17-2006, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VUONG, LAN AKA LAN T VUONG AKA VUONG T LAN AKA HUONG LAN VUONG

PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT,DISMISSAL, DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF 585 (A), WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES, WAIVER OF INTEREST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC SERVED SEP-14-2006, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT VUONG, LAN AKA LAN T VUONG AKA VUONG T LAN AKA HUONG LAN VUONG
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-15 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VUONG, LAN AKA LAN T VUONG AKA VUONG T LAN AKA HUONG LAN VUONG
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (A) AND DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL DOCUMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC

WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES AND WAIVER OF COST WHEN DEMAND OF COMPLAINT IS LESS THAN $5000 IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 1717.5 AND CCP 1033) AND WAIVER OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VUONG, LAN AKA LAN T VUONG AKA VUONG T LAN AKA HUONG LAN VUONG $1,982.58 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,982.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACE IN PICKUP BOX)
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
